query:
-- Migrate registered users with puzzle attempts
INSERT INTO leaderboard_scores (userId, playerName, totalPuzzles, correctPuzzles, accuracy, rating, totalMinutes, lastUpdated, createdAt)
SELECT 
  u.id,
  COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Player-', u.id)),
  COUNT(pa.id),
  SUM(pa.isCorrect),
  ROUND(SUM(pa.isCorrect) * 100.0 / COUNT(pa.id), 2),
  1200,
  COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(SUM(ch.totalTimeMs) / 60000.0, 2) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = u.id), 0),
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.createdAt) * 1000
FROM users u
INNER JOIN puzzle_attempts pa ON u.id = pa.userId
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.createdAt
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  totalPuzzles = VALUES(totalPuzzles),
  correctPuzzles = VALUES(correctPuzzles),
  accuracy = VALUES(accuracy),
  lastUpdated = VALUES(lastUpdated);

-- Migrate registered users WITHOUT puzzle attempts
INSERT INTO leaderboard_scores (userId, playerName, totalPuzzles, correctPuzzles, accuracy, rating, totalMinutes, lastUpdated, createdAt)
SELECT 
  u.id,
  COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Player-', u.id)),
  0, 0, 0, 1200, 0,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.createdAt) * 1000
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN puzzle_attempts pa ON u.id = pa.userId
WHERE pa.id IS NULL
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE playerName = VALUES(playerName);

-- Migrate guest players with puzzle attempts
INSERT INTO leaderboard_scores (deviceId, playerName, totalPuzzles, correctPuzzles, accuracy, rating, totalMinutes, lastUpdated, createdAt)
SELECT 
  pa.deviceId,
  CONCAT('Guest-', SUBSTRING(pa.deviceId, 1, 8)),
  COUNT(pa.id),
  SUM(pa.isCorrect),
  ROUND(SUM(pa.isCorrect) * 100.0 / COUNT(pa.id), 2),
  1200,
  COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(SUM(ch.totalTimeMs) / 60000.0, 2) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.deviceId = pa.deviceId AND ch.userId IS NULL), 0),
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MIN(pa.completedAt)) * 1000
FROM puzzle_attempts pa
WHERE pa.deviceId IS NOT NULL AND pa.userId IS NULL
GROUP BY pa.deviceId
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  totalPuzzles = VALUES(totalPuzzles),
  correctPuzzles = VALUES(correctPuzzles),
  accuracy = VALUES(accuracy),
  lastUpdated = VALUES(lastUpdated);

  pa.deviceId,
  CONCAT('Guest-', SUBSTRING(pa.deviceId, 1, 8)),
